Title: import_clr
Description:
This function automatically creates the SQL Type wrappers based on 
    the CLR Reflection API.

This function automatically creates the SQL Type wrappers based on 
    the CLR Reflection API.
Examples:
C:\Program Files\OpenLink\Virtuoso 3.0\bin>csc /target:library sanity.cs

Type HELP; for help and EXIT; to exit.
